description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow surrounded by a landscaped garden with flowering trees and shrubs. The building features a flat roof and a geometric, open-plan layout with large windows and multiple entry points. The exterior is composed of light-colored walls, glass panels, and metallic or concrete accents, giving it a sleek and contemporary appearance. The property is bordered by a paved road on all sides, with driveways and walkways leading to the main entrances. The garden includes manicured lawns, decorative plants, and a few mature trees, enhancing the residential appeal. Vehicles are parked along the perimeter, indicating easy access and integration with the urban environment.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and landscaped gardens, surrounded by paved roads and flowering trees.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main entrance, a large driveway, and a prominent landscaped area with flowering trees and shrubs.
description_view_1: Rear view highlights a wide lawn, additional entry points, and a symmetrical arrangement of windows and garden features.
description_view_2: Side view reveals the driveway, garage area, and the angular layout of the building with visible glass and concrete elements.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays more of the garden, a secondary entrance, and the continuation of the flat roof and window arrangement.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and front windows
